assessment: Level 1 produced 40 registered sources + dozens of inline-cited sources from search results, covering all required dimensions. Level 2 added 16 more registered sources from link-following. Total distinct sources: 56+ registered plus approximately 30 inline-cited URLs from search result content. The 216+ source target was not fully met — the report achieves sufficient breadth for the practical audience (freelancers/developers) but acknowledges this limitation.
